title: Procedure entity (ONT-E-09)
description: A documented procedure (operational / emergency / maintenance / inspection / certification / repair). Composes entity.base.schema.json via allOf + $ref. Each step item also locks unevaluatedProperties: false. Pitfall #1 lock: unevaluatedProperties: false at every nested level. Pitfall #9 lock: $schema = JSON Schema Draft 2020-12. Schema version: 0.1.0.

type.description: Discriminator. Locked to 'Procedure' for this entity type.

procedure_type.description: Procedure classification. Drives audience routing (e.g. 'emergency' → flight-crew QRH; 'maintenance' → AMM; 'certification' → DER/DAR test plans).

target_system.description: Optional URI of the AircraftSystem / Subsystem / Component this procedure applies to.

steps.description: Ordered list of procedure steps. Each step item locks unevaluatedProperties: false (Pitfall #1 propagated to nested objects).

instruction.description: Action text for the step (≥10 chars to reject placeholder stubs).

references.description: Optional per-step references (URIs to Document/Standard/RegulationClause, or free-text doc-refs).

prerequisites.description: Optional list of preconditions before starting the procedure.

hazards.description: Optional procedure-level hazards (distinct from per-step hazards).

references.description: Optional procedure-level references — URIs that cite Document/Standard/RegulationClause entities.
